Hero & CTAs.description: Controls the homepage hero copy and call-to-action buttons. Change values here for A/B tests without redeploying.

hero_cta_primary_text.description: Primary CTA button text on the hero section.

hero_cta_secondary_text.description: Secondary CTA button text on the hero section.

hero_headline_suffix.description: Suffix appended to the main hero headline: 'AI Platform Powering {suffix}'.

defaultValue.value: Only a few slots left this week

demo_urgency_label.description: Urgency nudge displayed near the demo booking CTA.

Feature Flags.description: Toggle major site sections on/off without a code redeploy.

pricing_visible.description: Set to false to hide the Pricing page link and section (e.g. during fundraising or pricing refresh).

show_investor_cta.description: Toggle visibility of the Investor CTA button in the navigation and home page.

show_blog_section.description: Toggle visibility of the Blog preview section on the home page.

Promotional Banner.description: Top-of-page promotional strip. Enable and set text here — no deploy needed.

promotional_banner_enabled.description: Set to true to show the promotional banner. Pair with promotional_banner_text.

promotional_banner_text.description: Message shown in the promo banner. E.g. 'Early-access pricing ends May 1 — Book a demo now!'

Messaging & Performance.description: Response promises shown to users, and Remote Config fetch tuning.

contact_response_promise.description: Response time promise displayed on the contact and demo pages.

min_fetch_interval_ms.description: Minimum interval (ms) between Remote Config fetches. Default 3600000 = 1 hour. Lower for faster flag propagation.
